style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A large rounded boundary labelled CANADA contains two boxes: NUAGE CONTRÔLÉ captioned ENTENTES D'ENTREPRISE, GARDE-FOUS, and GRAPPE SUR PLACE, HORS LIGNE captioned PROTÉGÉ C. Inside the boundary, a small flag-like motif labelled CALCUL SOUVERAIN with a caption EN CROISSANCE. Outside the boundary on the right, a box labelled INFÉRENCE AUX É.-U. connects into the CANADA boundary by a dashed arrow labelled CERTAINES CHARGES DE TRAVAIL AUJOURD'HUI. Along the bottom edge, a row of four small chips labelled NON CLASSIFIÉ, PROTÉGÉ A, PROTÉGÉ B, PROTÉGÉ C, with a small bracket under PROTÉGÉ B reading ENVIRON 99 POUR CENT AU PLUS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
